raw.message: Our Detroit-Style Pizza just pulled up! Thick crust, golden edges, cheesy corners, gooey mozzarella & crispy mini cup pepperoni. Grab one for $10.99.

hook.summary: Bold 'NEW' text followed by high-quality close-ups of a pepperoni pizza being sliced.
hook.visual_action: A pizza cutter slices through a thick, pepperoni-covered Detroit-style pizza with crispy edges.

scene_flow: Intro screen with 'NEW' text on a dark teal background.
Extreme close-up of bubbling cheese and pepperoni toppings.
Action shot of a pizza cutter slicing through the square crust.
Fast-paced montage of the pizza's crispy edges and fresh ingredients.
Final product reveal with 'DETROIT Style pizza' and '$10.99 EACH' pricing.
audience_proxy: Hungry consumers and pizza enthusiasts looking for a premium yet affordable meal option.
